Thoughts on AI, agents & ecommerce ops

Building in the open from Cairo. Sharing what we learn about AI agents, MCP, and the future of SaaS.

March 26, 2026 SaaSAI AgentsPricingMCP

The Agent Pricing Model: Why We Made Our Free Tier Read-Only

Most SaaS free tiers are limited by seat count or feature flags. We took a different approach: free agents can read everything, but can't act. Here's why — and why it works.
March 26, 2026 MCPAI AgentsEcommerceSaaSAPI

Why We Ditched 6 APIs and Built One MCP Server for Our Entire Ecommerce Stack

Managing 6 separate APIs was killing our AI agent workflows. Here's how consolidating everything into a single MCP server changed how agents interact with our business.
March 25, 2026 MCPAI AgentsSaaSEcommerce

How I Built an Agent-Native SaaS Platform in One Night

How we made Nexus fully accessible to AI agents in under 3 hours — self-registration, MCP server with 13 tools, and a pricing model designed for the agent era.
